title: The Dehra Dun Act, 1871
full_text: The Dehra Dun Act, 1871 देहरादून Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 187121 Act Number: 21 Enactment Date: 1871-07-11 Act Year: 1871 Short Title: The Dehra Dun Act, 1871 Hindi Title: देहरादून Long Title: An Act to give validity to the operation of the General Regulations and Acts within the Dehra Dun. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 11-07-1871 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Dehra Dun Act, 1871 Show all section Section 1. Extension of Regulations and Acts in force in Saharanpur to Dehra Dun. Section 2. Jurisdiction of High Court and Board of Revenue over Dehra Dun. Section 3. District Court of Saharanpur to be District Court of Dehra Dun. Section 4. Exemption of Jaunsar Bawar.
